title: 2022 presidential results
description: Country-level results match the final Congressional canvass proclamation (53,815,469 total votes). Sub-national results (province, city/municipality, barangay) are from the COMELEC transparency server (98.92% of local ERs received — 105,035 of 106,174 expected). Region totals are derived by summing their constituent municipalities. NCR cities attach directly to the region; NIR is derived from its provinces; HUCs are grouped under their geographical provinces.
